Container.Name: Stashify
Container.Overview: Stashify — upscale & decensor for Stash. This is the thin coordinator: it serves the HTTP API + dashboard and handles all Stash integration (tags, scene updates, plugin calls). It does NO GPU work itself — the heavy lifting (mosaic removal, upscaling, encoding) happens in the separate Stashify-Runner container, which this container talks to over HTTP (RUNNER_URL). Dashboard is also reachable directly at http://[IP]:[PORT:8710]. IMPORTANT: mount your media at the SAME container paths Stash uses so stored paths resolve, and put OUTPUT_DIR inside a Stash library path.
Container.Requires: A running Stash server and the Stashify-Runner container (does the GPU work).

Config.Name: Stash URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Stash server as reachable from this container.

Config.Name: Stash API Key
Config.Description: Stash > Settings > Security > API Key (required if Stash auth is on).

Config.Name: Worker Token
Config.Description: Optional shared secret; set the same value in the Stash plugin's Worker Token.

Config.Name: Backend
Config.Description: Processing backend. 'decensor' sends jobs to a compute runner ('lada' still accepted).

Config.Name: Runner URL
Config.Description: URL of the Stashify-Runner HTTP API. Use the unRAID host IP + runner port (bridge networking has no container-name DNS).

Config.Name: Runner Token
Config.Description: Optional shared secret for the runner API; must match RUNNER_TOKEN on Stashify-Runner.

Config.Name: Runner Scratch Path
Config.Description: Container path of the scratch dir shared with Stashify-Runner (both containers must mount the same host dir here).

Config.Name: Output Directory
Config.Description: Where finished files land. MUST be inside a Stash library path.

Config.Name: Run Mode
Config.Description: Keep 'server' to run the API + dashboard.

Config.Name: Extra Runners (JSON)
Config.Description: Optional JSON array of additional compute runners, e.g. [{"name":"desktop","url":"http://IP:8712","token":"...","ops":["upscale","transcode","decensor","decensor+upscale"],"prefer":["upscale"]}]. Runners added via the dashboard are stored separately (see Config mount) and merged with these.

Config.Name: Runner Store Path
Config.Description: Where dashboard-managed runners are persisted (keep under the /config mount).

Config.Name: Media (matches Stash /stuff)
Config.Description: Mount at the SAME container path Stash uses.

Config.Name: Media (matches Stash /stuff2)
Config.Description: Mount at the SAME container path Stash uses.

Config.Name: Scratch (shared with runner)
Config.Description: Working dir for in-flight jobs. Mount the SAME host dir into Stashify-Runner at /scratch.

Config.Name: Config (runner registry etc.)
Config.Description: Persists dashboard-managed settings such as the runner registry.
